9547.history: Grounded (thrown ashore in heavy weather) on the beach of Tanaga Island, Aleutians on 10 January 1944. She was patched up and refloated by a salvage party from the Coast Guard manned tug Ute assisted by some of the crew of YMS-127 on 13 January and towed to Adak Island. Later she sailed to Seattle but stricken on 16 September 1944 as a CTL (constructive total loss, not worth repairing). Sold on 30 August 1945 and converted for merchant use becoming m/v Vindicator.
